title: Improving outcomes for looked-after children in complex situations
body: "This report is about looked-after children and young people with multiple needs who either:   have been deprived of their liberty are at risk of being deprived of their liberty   It considers these children and young people’s:   characteristics journeys through the system   It draws insights into emerging approaches to multi-disciplinary funding, working and care.  The Department for Education (DfE) commissioned this report. Research in Practice and the National Children’s Bureau wrote it.  DfE’s aims are outlined in the thematic summary.  "

taxons.title: Health, wellbeing and education of looked-after children
